description: n=28 must NOT satisfy sigma*phi == n*tau
actual_cmd: python3 -c 'from math import gcd; sigma=lambda n:sum(i for i in range(1,n+1) if n%i==0); tau=lambda n:sum(1 for i in range(1,n+1) if n%i==0); phi=lambda n:sum(1 for k in range(1,n+1) if gcd(k,n)==1); print(int(sigma(28)*phi(28)==28*tau(28)))'
